ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "hypertension" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has hypertension */,
  "heart_disease" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has heart disease */,
  "ever_married" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has ever been married */,
  "avg_glucose_level" REAL /* Average glucose level of the patient */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the patient */,
  "stroke" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has had a stroke */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children the patient has */,
  "govt_job" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has a government job */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of known allergies */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption habits of the patient */,
  "genetic_conditions" TEXT /* Known genetic conditions of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_risk_factors" (
  "risk_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health risk factor */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the risk factor is associated with */,
  "risk_factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the health risk factor */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the health risk factor */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the risk factor */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the risk factor was recorded */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the risk factor */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations related to the risk factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_risk_factors_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the demographic data is associated with */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the patient */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the patient */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the patient */,
  "religion" TEXT /* Religious affiliation of the patient */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the patient */,
  "disabilities" TEXT /* Known disabilities of the patient */,
  "living_arrangement" TEXT /* Living arrangement of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the history is associated with */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis given to the patient */,
  "date_diagnosed" TEXT /* Date when the diagnosis was made */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the patient */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the diagnosis was made */,
  "doctor_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations from the doctor */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Medication prescribed for the condition */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the next follow-up appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_records" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the vaccination is associated with */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine */,
  "date_administered" TEXT /* Date when the vaccine was administered */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Dose number of the vaccine */,
  "vaccination_site" TEXT /* Site where the vaccine was administered */,
  "lot_number" TEXT /* Lot number of the vaccine */,
  "administration_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations related to the vaccination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the appointment is for */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor the appointment is with */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., Scheduled, Completed) */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the appointment is held */,
  "appointment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations related to the appointment */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the doctor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the doctor */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the doctor works */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the doctor has */,
  "medical_license_number" TEXT /* Medical license number of the doctor */,
  "specialization_certifications" TEXT /* Certifications the doctor holds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doctors_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action taken (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital or clinic */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital or clinic */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hospital or clinic */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the hospital or clinic */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the hospital or clinic */,
  "hospital_type" TEXT /* Type of hospital (e.g., general, specialized) */,
  "number_of_beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds in the hospital */,
  "emergency_services" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the hospital has emergency services */,
  "specialized_departments" TEXT /* List of specialized departments in the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_hospital_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-hospital association */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital or clinic */,
  "association_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the association started */,
  "association_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the association ended (if applicable) */,
  "reason_for_association" TEXT /* Reason for the patient's association with the hospital */,
  "primary_doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary doctor for the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_hospital_associations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_hospital_associations_primary_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_hospital_associations_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)
